name: The Hype Cycle
image_sign_text: THE FUTURE IS NOW. INVEST ACCORDINGLY.
effect: Declare a transformative capability before it exists. This card is considered inevitable.

clauses.name: PEAK INFLATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: While this card is in play: All adjacent capabilities are considered revolutionary.

clauses.name: TROUGH OF DISILLUSIONMENT EFFECT
clauses.rule: If a deliverable is requested: This card loses all ATK until a new narrative is introduced.

clauses.name: NARRATIVE RECOVERY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If a new acronym is introduced: Reset all expectations and replay from Peak Inflation.
